servinfo.title: Passenger Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: When handling an air bag (inflator) module, be sure to read Precautions for Handling and Storage of Air Bag System Components and observe each instruction. Failure to follow them could cause damage to air bag (inflator) module or result in personal injury.
Never insert foreign matter such as flat-end screwdriver between passenger air bag (inflator) module connector and “G259” connector as static electricity may cause accidental deployment.

attention3.ptxt: Refer to Repair and Inspection Required after Accident before replacing a deployed air bag.

s1.ptxt: Remove passenger air bag door screws (1).
Remove passenger air bag (inflator) module bolts (2).
Disconnect passenger air bag (inflator) module connector (4) as shown in figure.
Remove claws (1), then remove passenger air bag (inflator) module (2) from passenger air bag door (3).

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Fit claws (1) of passenger air bag (inflator) module (2) to passenger air bag door (3) securely.
Lock connector for air bag (inflator) module securely.
Tighten passenger air bag (inflator) module bolts to specified torque.
